text: This is Richard Dennis. He is one of the
most famous traders who made millions of
dollars in the 70s and 80s. To be
specific, at the age of 22, he borrowed
$1600 that he would turn into $350
million.
>> Are you serious right now?
>> Yes, you heard me right. $350 million.
And what's even crazier, he did all of
this in the span of 9 years. That's
insane. He applied a simple and
unorthodox strategy that so many other
traders criticized Dennis for. Moreover,
William Eckhart, another great
successful trader of that era, claimed
that trading cannot be taught. It's only
an innate talent. Dennis believed that
anyone could learn to trade if
adequately trained. To prove his thesis,
he launched an experiment that would
become legendary in trading history. He
recruited and trained 21 men and two
women. They came from completely
different backgrounds, clerks,
musicians, chess players, ordinary
people with no trading experience. This
group became known as the turtle
traders. When the experiment ended 5
years later, his turtles had generated a
total profit of $175 million. Dennis's
students achieved incredible results,
proving that discipline beats talent
every time. In fact, Dennis expected to
lose on most of his trades. But when
trades went right, they would run for
weeks or even months. And that's what
made the strategy wildly profitable.
Today, several of these former turtle
traders have become successful hedge

many had already reached millionaire

Before jumping directly into Richard
Dennis's strategies, we need to discuss
the core principles he used in the
trading world. Risk a fixed percentage
per trade. Cut your losses quickly. Let
your profits run. Trade trends, not
predictions. Richard always told his
students they should risk no more than
2% of their account on each trade. This
type of percentage has always been
variable over the years since it depends

Dennis used this type of risk management
as his foundation. The main part of his
theories was based on one crucial
concept. Cut losses as quickly as
possible and let profits run. This is
what separates the professionals from
everyone else. Let me show you exactly

The trend explodes upward. This is

if you're starting in the trading world
might shock you quite a bit. You don't
need a positive win rate to be

make 25% and you'll have made a lot of

Trend, consolidation zone or range as we
